CustomField.description: Select this option if the Rate Schedule requires manual review and approval. When enabled, Approval Status and approval buttons will be available to approve rates in bulk or individually. Approved rates will be locked for editing. Only approved Rate Schedules are considered during utilization (not applicable if this option is unchecked).
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Select this option if the Rate Schedule requires manual review and approval. When enabled, Approval Status and approval buttons will be available to approve rates in bulk or individually. Approved rates will be locked for editing. Only approved Rate Schedules are considered during utilization (not applicable if this option is unchecked).
CustomField.label: Rate Schedule Manual Approval Required?
